variants.name: lexical_baseline
variants.note: Exact/path lexical baseline under the same fixed K.

variants.name: ctxhelm_default
variants.note: Current default ranking without semantic default promotion.

variants.name: local_metadata_reranked
variants.note: Eval-only deterministic local metadata reranker over source-free candidate metadata.

variants.name: query_family_routed_reranked
variants.note: Eval-only local metadata reranker gated to route-safe source-free query families.

variants.name: local_semantic
variants.note: Explicit local semantic retrieval using source-free semantic documents.

variants.name: semantic_corroborated_reranked
variants.note: Eval-only metadata reranker that gives bounded credit to semantic candidates only when another source-free signal corroborates them.

variants.name: precision_enriched_semantic
variants.note: Skipped because no fresh precision overlay was available.

variants.name: semantic_precision_full_hybrid
variants.note: Full hybrid is held unless semantic plus precision beats default gates.

variants.name: support_profile_routed_semantic
variants.note: Eval-only synthetic route that inserts semantic candidates only for support profiles with semantic-only targets and no semantic-only non-targets.

diagnostics.message: Provider policy file was not found; using local source-free defaults.
Remote embedding or reranking providers are blocked by local source-free policy.
Provider policy file was not found; using local source-free defaults.
Remote embedding or reranking providers are blocked by local source-free policy.
Semantic provider `local_fastembed` missed target files that already had source-free graph/history/symbol signals; prioritize graph/fusion ordering before adding more semantic text.
Semantic provider `local_fastembed` missed target files with no lexical, graph, history, or area signal; inspect semantic document/query construction for these path families.

Semantic provider `local_fastembed` generated source-free candidates for missed retrieval targets, but final top-K selection did not include them; tune fusion, ranking, or budget before query construction.
Semantic provider `local_fastembed` contributed target file(s) absent from the lexical baseline top K.
Semantic retrieval has clean target-only commits for query family `broad_scope`, but also mixed/noise commits; validate on a larger slice before routing this family.
Semantic retrieval has both corroborated semantic-only targets and corroborated semantic-only non-targets for query family `broad_scope`.
Semantic retrieval has both unique target hits and unique non-targets for query family `broad_scope`; hold for better fusion evidence.
Semantic support profile `lexical_expansion_co_change` has semantic-only target hits without semantic-only non-targets for query family `broad_scope`.
Semantic support profile `lexical_expansion` has semantic-only non-targets without semantic-only targets for query family `broad_scope`.
Semantic retrieval has clean target-only commits for query family `domain_phrase`, but also mixed/noise commits; validate on a larger slice before routing this family.
Semantic retrieval has both corroborated semantic-only targets and corroborated semantic-only non-targets for query family `domain_phrase`.
Semantic retrieval has both unique target hits and unique non-targets for query family `domain_phrase`; hold for better fusion evidence.
Semantic support profile `lexical_expansion_dependency` has both semantic-only targets and semantic-only non-targets for query family `domain_phrase`.
Semantic support profile `lexical_expansion` has semantic-only non-targets without semantic-only targets for query family `domain_phrase`.
Semantic support profile `lexical_related_test_co_change` has semantic-only non-targets without semantic-only targets for query family `domain_phrase`.
Local metadata reranker lost target hits on some commits; keep reranking opt-in or route by query family.
Local metadata reranker retrieved additional target files on measured commits.
Local metadata reranker reduced protected retrieval-target miss-rate by 0.366.
Local metadata reranker added target hits but also replaced some target files that default retrieved; use this as routing evidence rather than an unconditional default.
Some query families improve net target hits but still churn default targets; hold routing for those families until churn is reduced.
Query-family routed reranker preserved target hits but did not add target hits in this gate.
Semantic/precision gate found named regressions; keep feature opt-in.
